summary: This document is a January 2025 pitch deck for KeepMeCompany, outlining their AI-powered phone agent solution for UK GP practices. It details the market opportunity, product capabilities, current pilot status, and a fundraising goal of €1.2m. The deck also addresses potential investor questions regarding defensibility, sales cycles, and operational risks.
